papers.title: A 6-Item Diagnostic Screener for Childbirth-Related PTSD
papers.translated_title: 一项6项分娩相关创伤后应激障碍诊断筛查工具
papers.author: Bartal, A.
papers.summary: Posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD) after traumatic childbirth is a serious maternal morbidity that affects about 20% of women following medically complicated deliveries. Yet it often goes undetected in perinatal care, in part because brief screening tools suitable for busy obstetric settings are lacking. We developed and evaluated a brief screener derived from the 20-item PTSD Checklist for DSM- 5 (PCL- 5) to detect childbirth-related PTSD. Women with traumatic childbirth experiences completed the PCL- 5 and the gold-standard Clinician-Administered PTSD Scale for DSM-5 (CAPS- 5); depression symptoms were assessed with the Edinburgh Postnatal Depression Scale (EPDS). Bootstrap resampling with LASSO regression identified the PCL- 5 items most strongly associated with PTSD, and Firth logistic regression was used to estimate diagnostic accuracy. A statistically derived 6-item version of the PCL- 5 (PCL- 5- R6) showed excellent discrimination against clinician diagnosis (AUC = 0.95; 95% CI, 0.89-1.00). A cut-off score of 7 yielded high sensitivity (0.96) and good specificity (0.83), with overall diagnostic efficiency of 0.86. The PCL- 5- R6 correlated only moderately with EPDS scores ({rho} = 0.53), indicating that depression screening alone does not reliably detect PTSD. This brief tool can offer a valid and practical approach for routine postpartum PTSD screening.
papers.translated_summary: 创伤性分娩后的创伤后应激障碍（PTSD）是一种严重的产妇并发症，约20%经历医疗复杂分娩的女性会受到影响。然而，这种疾病在围产期护理中常被忽视，部分原因是缺乏适合繁忙产科环境的简短筛查工具。我们开发并评估了一种基于20项DSM-5 PTSD检查表（PCL-5）的简短筛查工具，用于检测分娩相关PTSD。有创伤性分娩经历的女性完成了PCL-5和黄金标准的DSM-5临床医生管理PTSD量表（CAPS-5）；抑郁症状通过爱丁堡产后抑郁量表（EPDS）评估。采用Bootstrap重抽样与LASSO回归识别与PTSD最相关的PCL-5条目，并使用Firth逻辑回归估计诊断准确性。统计推导出的6项PCL-5版本（PCL-5-R6）在区分临床诊断方面表现出色（AUC = 0.95；95% CI，0.89-1.00）。截断值为7时，灵敏度高达0.96，特异性良好为0.83，总体诊断效率为0.86。PCL-5-R6与EPDS评分仅呈中等相关（ρ = 0.53），表明仅靠抑郁筛查无法可靠检测PTSD。这一简短工具可为常规产后PTSD筛查提供有效且实用的方法。

papers.title: Translating 3D Slicer into Brazilian Portuguese: A methodological approach to software localization in Latin America
papers.translated_title: 将3D Slicer翻译为巴西葡萄牙语：拉丁美洲软件本地化的方法论
papers.author: Veiga, P. E. d. B.
papers.summary: 3D Slicer is an open-source software platform for the analysis, segmentation, and three-dimensional visualization of medical imaging data. Although the platform is used by an international research community, its interface was historically available primarily in English, which may limit accessibility for non-English-speaking users. This study describes the development of an ad hoc methodology for the Brazilian Portuguese localization of 3D Slicer within the broader Latin American localization initiative. The methodology addresses recurrent linguistic challenges identified in a preliminary corpus of 300 interface strings, including domain-specific vocabulary, acronyms, word order, passive voice, syntagms, and the adaptation of technical terms. The translation process emphasizes textual uniformity, cohesion, terminological accuracy, and contextual validation in biomedical-computational environments. The proposed framework may support similar software localization efforts in other non-English-speaking contexts, especially when technical precision and linguistic adaptation must be balanced.
papers.translated_summary: 3D Slicer是一个用于医学影像数据分析、分割和三维可视化的开源软件平台。尽管该平台被国际研究社区广泛使用，但其界面历史上主要以英文提供，这可能限制了非英语用户的可访问性。本研究描述了在更广泛的拉丁美洲本地化倡议中，为3D Slicer开发巴西葡萄牙语本地化专用方法的过程。该方法针对初步语料库中300个界面字符串中发现的反复出现的语言挑战，包括领域特定词汇、缩写词、词序、被动语态、词组结构以及技术术语的适配。翻译过程强调文本一致性、连贯性、术语准确性以及在生物医学计算环境中的语境验证。所提出的框架可为其他非英语环境中的类似软件本地化工作提供支持，尤其是在需要平衡技术精确性与语言适配性的场景中。

papers.title: Patient-specific in silico prediction of outcomes of partial continuous-flow LVAD treatment in peripartum cardiomyopathy
papers.translated_title: 围产期心肌病中部分连续流左心室辅助装置治疗结果的患者特异性计算机模拟预测
papers.author: Nagawa, J.
papers.summary: Patients with severe peripartum cardiomyopathy (PPCM) often receive mechanical circulatory support with good outcomes. However, mechanisms underlying the functional improvements are poorly understood for patients with different PPCM characteristics. This study investigated effects of partial, continuous-flow left ventricular assist device (LVAD) support on cardiac function and mechanics in patients with different PPCM severity. Patient-specific biventricular finite element models of six patients with different PPCM severity were developed from magnetic resonance images and combined with a circulatory system model, including variable LVAD support. Ventricular function and myocardial mechanics were predicted and changes due to LVAD support were quantified. The LVAD support decreased LV myofiber stress and increased ejection fraction (EF). EF increased steadily (two patients), fluctuated (two patients), or peaked before a steady decrease (two patients) with increasing LVAD speed. Improvement due to LVAD support was greater for PPCM patients with higher disease severity than those with lower disease severity. The LVAD and native LV jointly generated stroke volume (SV) in four patients, and the LV contribution diminished with increasing LVAD speed. In the two patients with the lowest EF, the LVAD was the sole source of SV. The improvement of cardiac function and mechanics due to LVAD support in PPCM exceeds that reported for chronic heart failure due to ischemia. However, the predicted variability of the LVAD benefits with PPCM severity and mechanical support level suggests the need and potential for further studies to guide clinicians in selecting personalised treatment parameters required for optimised LVAD therapy for each PPCM patient.
papers.translated_summary: 重度围产期心肌病（PPCM）患者接受机械循环支持后通常预后良好，但不同特征PPCM患者心功能改善的潜在机制尚不明确。本研究探讨了部分连续流左心室辅助装置（LVAD）支持对不同严重程度PPCM患者心脏功能及力学特性的影响。基于六例不同严重程度PPCM患者的磁共振影像，构建了患者特异性双心室有限元模型，并与包含可变LVAD支持的循环系统模型相结合。预测了心室功能与心肌力学参数，并量化了LVAD支持带来的变化。LVAD支持降低了左心室肌纤维应力并提高了射血分数（EF）。随着LVAD转速增加，EF呈现持续升高（两例）、波动（两例）或先达峰值后稳定下降（两例）三种模式。疾病严重程度较高的PPCM患者从LVAD支持中获得的改善程度优于低严重程度患者。四例患者的每搏输出量（SV）由LVAD与原生左心室共同产生，且左心室贡献随LVAD转速升高而减少；在两例EF最低的患者中，LVAD成为SV的唯一来源。LVAD支持对PPCM患者心功能及力学特性的改善效果优于缺血性慢性心力衰竭的报道结果。然而，LVAD获益随PPCM严重程度及机械支持水平变化的预测差异表明，需进一步研究以指导临床医生为每位PPCM患者选择优化LVAD治疗所需的个性化参数。

papers.title: Polyethylene and Polyvinyl Chloride Nanoplastics Accelerate Atherosclerosis Through Distinct Changes in Smooth Muscle Cell Phenotype
papers.translated_title: 聚乙烯和聚氯乙烯纳米塑料通过平滑肌细胞表型的特异性变化加速动脉粥样硬化
papers.author: Zheng, S.
papers.summary: Micro- and nanoplastics (MNPs) are increasingly detected in human tissues, yet their causal contribution to cardiovascular disease remains poorly understood. Here we show that oral exposure to polyethylene (PE) and polyvinyl chloride (PVC) -- the most abundant polymers found in human atheromas -- accelerates atherosclerosis in ApoE-/- mice through distinct, polymer-specific molecular mechanisms. While both polymers increased plaque burden and reduced contractile smooth muscle cell (SMC) markers, single-cell transcriptomic profiling revealed divergent phenotypic trajectories. PE exposure drives SMCs toward a chondromyocyte-like cell (CMC) state, characterized by upregulated osteogenic signaling and markedly increased vascular calcification. Conversely, PVC exposure promotes a fibromyocyte-like program associated with altered collagen metabolism and accelerated cell migration without enhancing calcification. These distinct SMC programs are reflected in the transcriptional signatures of symptomatic human carotid plaques, suggesting clinical relevance for polymer-specific vascular remodeling. Our findings establish a causal link between common environmental plastics and accelerated atherosclerosis, demonstrating that MNP-induced vascular risk is mediated by divergent SMC fate decisions. These results provide a mechanistic framework for assessing the cardiovascular impact of global plastic pollution and identifying potential therapeutic targets to mitigate MNP-associated vascular toxicity.
papers.translated_summary: 微塑料和纳米塑料（MNPs）在人体组织中被越来越多地检出，但其对心血管疾病的因果作用仍不明确。本研究发现，口服聚乙烯（PE）和聚氯乙烯（PVC）——人类动脉粥样斑块中含量最丰富的两种聚合物——通过各自独特的分子机制加速ApoE-/-小鼠的动脉粥样硬化进程。尽管两种聚合物均增加斑块负荷并减少收缩型平滑肌细胞（SMC）标志物，单细胞转录组分析揭示了不同的表型演化轨迹。PE暴露驱动SMC向软骨肌样细胞（CMC）状态转化，表现为成骨信号上调及血管钙化显著增加。而PVC暴露则促进纤维肌样细胞程序，伴随胶原代谢改变和细胞迁移加速，但未增强钙化。这些差异化的SMC程序在症状性人类颈动脉斑块的转录特征中得以体现，提示聚合物特异性血管重塑具有临床相关性。本研究建立了常见环境塑料与动脉粥样硬化加速之间的因果关联，证实MNP诱导的血管风险由差异化的SMC命运决定所介导。这些结果为评估全球塑料污染对心血管系统的影响提供了机制框架，并确定了缓解MNP相关血管毒性的潜在治疗靶点。

papers.title: First-time child protection contacts from the prenatal period to age 15 among Aboriginal children born 2006-2020: a whole-population cohort study in New South Wales, Australia
papers.translated_title: 2006-2020年出生原住民儿童从产前至15岁首次儿童保护接触情况：澳大利亚新南威尔士州全人群队列研究
papers.author: Hanly, M. J.
papers.summary: Background First Nations children are over-represented in child protection systems in Australia and other colonised countries. Here, we apply a prevention and equity lens to the use of child protection data, to inform early opportunities to support Aboriginal children and families at risk of escalating child protection contact, from pregnancy to adolescence. Methods We followed 15 whole-population cohorts (born 2006-2020) of Aboriginal (n=119,716) and non-Aboriginal (n=1,456,698) children in New South Wales (NSW), Australia, to December 2021, using birth and child protection datasets linked for the NSW Child E-Cohort. In each Aboriginal and non-Aboriginal cohort born 2006 to 2020, we calculated the cumulative incidence (risk) of first-time child protection contacts from the prenatal period up to age 15 years: reports to child protection, screened in reports, investigations, child protection-defined substantiations (of actual harm or risk of significant harm assessed in the investigation), and OOHC placements. Risk differences and relative risks were also calculated. Findings By birth, 10-15% of Aboriginal children born 2006-2020 had a first report to child protection, with 48-54% by age 5y (2006-2016 births), and 74% by age 15y (2006 births), with similar risks of screened-in reports (e.g. 68% by age 15y). The risk of first-time substantiation was 1-5% of Aboriginal children by birth, 17-20% by 5y, and 32% by 15y, with higher risks in more contemporary cohorts. By age 1y, 3-4% of Aboriginal children born 2006-2020 had a first OOHC placement, with 7-9% by 5y, and 14% by 15y. The risk differences between Aboriginal and non-Aboriginal children were 23 and 3 percentage points for reports and OOHC by age 1y (2020 births), respectively, increasing as children age. Interpretation Despite extensive inquiries, calls for prevention and Closing the Gap targets, our study shows the lifetime risk of child protection involvement for Aboriginal families has not improved and inequities persist. These findings support the call for Aboriginal-led approaches and greater investment in early supports for First Nations children and families.
papers.translated_summary: 背景 在澳大利亚及其他曾被殖民的国家，原住民儿童在儿童保护系统中的比例过高。本研究从预防与公平视角出发，运用儿童保护数据，为从孕期至青春期阶段面临儿童保护介入风险升级的原住民儿童及家庭提供早期支持机会。方法 我们追踪了澳大利亚新南威尔士州2006-2020年出生的15个全人群队列（原住民儿童119,716名，非原住民儿童1,456,698名），数据追踪至2021年12月，使用新州儿童电子队列关联的出生与儿童保护数据集。针对2006-2020年出生的每个原住民与非原住民队列，我们计算了从产前阶段至15岁期间首次儿童保护接触的累积发生率（风险）：包括儿童保护报告、筛查后受理报告、调查、儿童保护认定的证实案件（调查评估的实际伤害或显著伤害风险）及家庭外安置。同时计算了风险差值与相对风险。结果 截至出生时，2006-2020年出生的原住民儿童中有10-15%已产生首次儿童保护报告；至5岁时该比例达48-54%（2006-2016年出生队列），至15岁时达74%（2006年出生队列），筛查后受理报告的风险与之相似（如15岁时达68%）。首次证实案件的风险为：出生时1-5%，5岁时17-20%，15岁时32%，且近期出生队列风险更高。至1岁时，2006-2020年出生的原住民儿童中有3-4%经历首次家庭外安置，5岁时达7-9%，15岁时达14%。原住民与非原住民儿童的风险差值在1岁时（2020年出生队列）分别为报告率23个百分点、家庭外安置率3个百分点，且随年龄增长持续扩大。解释 尽管开展了大量调查、预防呼吁及"缩小差距"目标行动，本研究表明原住民家庭终身面临儿童保护介入的风险并未改善，不平等现象持续存在。这些发现支持由原住民主导的应对方式，并需加大对原住民儿童及家庭的早期支持投入。

papers.title: Shared Genetic Architecture of Psychosis, Mood, and Cognition in East Asian Ancestry
papers.translated_title: 东亚人群中精神病、情绪与认知的共同遗传结构
papers.author: Lim, K.
papers.summary: Genomic insights into psychiatric disorders remain heavily skewed toward European populations. In European-ancestry studies, educational attainment is typically negatively genetically correlated with major depression but paradoxically positively correlated with schizophrenia, raising the question of whether these relationships generalize across ancestries. We investigated whether this cross-trait architecture extends to East Asian ancestry (EAS). Using EAS GWAS summary statistics for major depressive disorder (MDD), schizophrenia (SZ), and educational attainment (EDU), we applied multi-trait (MTAG) and pleiotropy-informed (PLEIO) analyses to characterize shared genetic architecture across these traits. Across MTAG and PLEIO analyses, we identified 32 unique genome-wide significant loci (p < 5 x 10-8), including seven novel loci revealed in depression analysis that overlapped schizophrenia-associated signals, consistent with shared cross-trait architecture. Results reinforce a convergent risk architecture for affective and psychotic disorders in this population. Fine-mapping analyses prioritized variants mapping to candidate genes, including serine/threonine kinase VRK2, nominating targets for future follow-up. Cross-trait analyses supported a positive genetic relationship between EDU and MDD (rg = 0.308, p = 9.63 x 10-17) in East Asian data, contrasting to the negative correlation typically observed in European ancestry. These findings suggest that the genetic relationship between educational attainment and psychiatric risk may not be fully transferable across ancestries. In an independent cohort of individuals at ultra-high risk for psychosis, MTAG-derived polygenic risk scores improved case-control discrimination relative to single-trait GWAS-based scores. These results underscore the importance of ancestry-specific genomic frameworks for interpreting cross-trait psychiatric architecture and improving polygenic prediction.
papers.translated_summary: 精神疾病基因组学研究仍严重偏向欧洲人群。在欧洲血统研究中，教育程度通常与重度抑郁症呈负遗传相关，但与精神分裂症呈正遗传相关，这引发了一个问题：这些关系是否在不同血统中具有普适性。本研究探讨了这种跨性状结构是否延伸至东亚血统。利用东亚血统重度抑郁症、精神分裂症和教育程度的GWAS汇总统计数据，我们采用多性状分析和多效性信息分析来表征这些性状间的共享遗传结构。通过MTAG和PLEIO分析，我们识别出32个独特的全基因组显著位点，其中包含抑郁症分析中发现的7个与精神分裂症相关信号重叠的新位点，这与跨性状共享遗传结构一致。研究结果强化了该人群中情感障碍与精神病性障碍的趋同风险结构。精细定位分析优先筛选出映射到候选基因的变异，包括丝氨酸/苏氨酸激酶VRK2，为后续研究确定了靶点。跨性状分析支持东亚数据中教育程度与重度抑郁症呈正遗传相关，这与欧洲血统中通常观察到的负相关形成对比。这些发现表明教育程度与精神疾病风险之间的遗传关系可能无法完全跨血统转移。在独立的精神病超高危个体队列中，基于MTAG的多基因风险评分相比单性状GWAS评分改善了病例对照区分能力。这些结果凸显了血统特异性基因组框架对于解释跨性状精神疾病结构及改进多基因预测的重要性。

papers.title: Longitudinal Receptive-Expressive Language Profiles in Young Autistic Children
papers.translated_title: 年轻自闭症儿童纵向接受性-表达性语言特征
papers.author: Latreche, K.
papers.summary: Abstract Background & Aims: Language development in autism is heterogeneous and strongly predicts later functioning. The balance between receptive and expressive abilities and their developmental trajectories, however, remains poorly understood. While some autistic children exhibit a relative expressive advantage (ExpAdv), others show receptive advantage (RecAdv) or a balanced profile. Prior studies report inconsistent findings and are often limited by cross-sectional designs and small samples. The present study aimed to (1) describe longitudinal trajectories of receptive and expressive language in autistic and typically developing (TD) children; (2) classify children into ExpAdv, Balanced, and RecAdv profiles across early childhood; and (3) examine the stability and transitions of these profiles over time, including associated clinical features. Methods: We analyzed 1,174 longitudinal time points from 318 autistic children and 294 time points from 108 TD children (1.2-5.8 years) from the Geneva Autism Cohort. Receptive and expressive language were assessed with the Mullen Scales of Early Learning. Receptive-expressive balance was quantified as the ratio of receptive to expressive age equivalent scores, classifying children into ExpAdv, Balanced, and RecAdv profiles using adapted cut-offs. Mixed-effects models examined developmental trajectories, and Sankey diagrams visualized profile transitions. Autism features and adaptive behavior were compared across profiles. Results: Autistic children displayed lower expressive and receptive language than TD peers, with receptive abilities exceeding expressive skills in both groups. Overall, 30-35% of autistic children were classified as ExpAdv at 18-36 months, declining to ~12% by 48-54 months, while Balanced and RecAdv profiles became more prevalent with age. ExpAdv was associated with slower verbal and non-verbal developmental gains. Stability was highest for Balanced and RecAdv profiles (50-60%), whereas ExpAdv often transitioned to Balanced. Autistic children with stable ExpAdv profiles were more often female, less likely to receive early intervention, and showed weaker adaptive communication. Conclusions: Receptive-expressive language profiles in autistic children are dynamic. ExpAdv profile is more frequent in younger autistic children, less stable, and linked to slower verbal and non-verbal development and higher autism severity. Implications: ExpAdv may represent an early marker of autism associated with slower expressive and receptive language growth. Longitudinal monitoring of receptive and expressive skills is essential, as transitions toward Balanced or RecAdv profiles are associated with improved developmental outcomes. Early intervention before age three may facilitate transitions toward Balanced or RecAdv profiles, supporting more favorable language development and long-term outcomes. Keywords: autism; early childhood; longitudinal design; expressive language; receptive language; language profile; early intervention; language gap; discrepant profiles
papers.translated_summary: 摘要 背景与目的：自闭症儿童的语言发展具有高度异质性，且对后期功能水平具有强预测作用。然而，接受性与表达性语言能力的平衡关系及其发展轨迹仍不明确。部分自闭症儿童表现出相对表达优势（ExpAdv），另一些则呈现接受优势（RecAdv）或均衡型语言特征。既往研究结果不一致，且多受限于横断面设计和小样本量。本研究旨在：（1）描述自闭症与典型发育（TD）儿童接受性与表达性语言的纵向发展轨迹；（2）将儿童在幼儿期划分为ExpAdv、均衡型和RecAdv三种语言特征类型；（3）考察这些特征类型的稳定性及随时间的变化模式，并分析相关临床特征。方法：本研究纳入日内瓦自闭症队列中318名自闭症儿童（1174个纵向观测点）和108名TD儿童（294个观测点），年龄范围为1.2-5.8岁。采用Mullen早期学习量表评估接受性与表达性语言能力。通过接受性与表达性年龄当量分数的比值量化语言平衡性，采用适应性切分点将儿童划分为ExpAdv、均衡型和RecAdv三种特征类型。运用混合效应模型分析发展轨迹，采用桑基图可视化特征类型转换模式，并比较不同特征类型间的自闭症特征与适应性行为差异。结果：自闭症儿童表达性与接受性语言能力均低于TD同龄人，两组均呈现接受能力优于表达能力的特点。总体而言，30-35%的自闭症儿童在18-36个月时被归类为ExpAdv，至48-54个月时降至约12%，而均衡型和RecAdv特征类型随年龄增长更为普遍。ExpAdv特征与较慢的语言及非语言发展速度相关。均衡型和RecAdv特征类型稳定性最高（50-60%），而ExpAdv特征常向均衡型转变。具有稳定ExpAdv特征的自闭症儿童中女性比例更高，接受早期干预的可能性更低，且适应性沟通能力较弱。结论：自闭症儿童的接受-表达语言特征类型具有动态性。ExpAdv特征在低龄自闭症儿童中更常见，稳定性较低，且与较慢的语言及非语言发展速度、更高的自闭症严重程度相关。启示：ExpAdv可能作为自闭症的早期标志，提示表达性与接受性语言发展速度较慢。纵向监测接受性与表达性语言能力至关重要，因为向均衡型或RecAdv特征类型的转变与更好的发展结局相关。三岁前的早期干预可能促进向均衡型或RecAdv特征类型的转变，从而支持更有利的语言发展与长期结局。关键词：自闭症；幼儿期；纵向设计；表达性语言；接受性语言；语言特征类型；早期干预；语言差距；差异型特征类型

papers.title: Diverging Pre-Pandemic Mortality Trends: Age-Specific and Cause-Specific Patterns Across High-Income Countries
papers.translated_title: 疫情前死亡率趋势的分化：高收入国家中按年龄和死因划分的模式
papers.author: Perez-Reche, F.
papers.summary: Background: Mortality rates have declined across most high-income countries for decades, but recent evidence suggests a slowdown in improvements or a shift to increasing mortality, particularly among working-age populations. The international distribution and drivers of these trends remain incompletely understood. Methods: Mortality trends during 2012-2019 were analysed using all-cause and cause-specific data from 30 countries. Trends were estimated via linear regression. K-means clustering with Dynamic Time Warping identified countries and ICD-10 chapters with similar temporal trajectories. Results: Trends varied substantially by nation. While Japan, Switzerland, and the Republic of Korea maintained consistent declines in all-cause mortality rates, increases were concentrated in the United States, Canada, and the United Kingdom, most prominently in persons aged 30-59 years. However, cause-specific analysis showed that rising mortality was not confined to these countries: most countries exhibited increases in at least one ICD-10 chapter, with several European countries showing increases across multiple chapters. Across countries, a small set of causes recurred among increasing trends, including external causes (self-harm, drug poisoning) at younger ages and chronic conditions (cardiovascular and liver diseases, specific cancers) in mid-life. Notably, ill-defined causes of death consistently appeared among the increasing causes across countries and age groups. Conclusions: Mortality increases in the 2010s were geographically more widespread than previously recognized. The recurrent rise in mortality from ill-defined causes suggests that an important component of mortality change remains poorly characterized. These findings indicate that stalled health progress is a systemic challenge across many high-income societies.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：过去几十年，大多数高收入国家的死亡率持续下降，但近期证据显示改善速度放缓，甚至出现死亡率上升趋势，尤其是劳动年龄人口。这些趋势的国际分布及其驱动因素尚未完全明确。方法：利用30个国家的全因及死因特异性数据，分析2012-2019年死亡率变化趋势。通过线性回归估算趋势，采用动态时间规整的K均值聚类法识别具有相似时间轨迹的国家和ICD-10章节。结果：各国趋势差异显著。日本、瑞士和韩国全因死亡率持续下降，而美国、加拿大和英国的死亡率上升，尤以30-59岁人群最为突出。但死因特异性分析显示，死亡率上升并非局限于这些国家：大多数国家至少有一个ICD-10章节的死亡率上升，多个欧洲国家甚至出现跨章节的普遍增长。各国上升趋势中反复出现的死因包括：年轻人群的外因（自残、药物中毒）和中年群体的慢性病（心血管疾病、肝病、特定癌症）。值得注意的是，死因不明类别在各年龄段和国家的上升死因中始终存在。结论：2010年代死亡率上升的地理范围比此前认知更为广泛。死因不明类别的反复上升表明，死亡率变化的重要成分仍未得到充分解析。这些发现提示，健康改善停滞是许多高收入社会面临的系统性挑战。

papers.title: Prevalence and Clinical Determinants of Cognitive Impairment in Diverse Patients with Parkinson's Disease
papers.translated_title: 帕金森病不同患者群体中认知障碍的患病率及临床决定因素
papers.author: Zirra, A.
papers.summary: Importance: The real-world prevalence and the clinical determinants associated with cognitive impairment in diverse patients with Parkinson disease (PD) have been understudied. Objective: To determine the prevalence of cognitive impairment in a diverse PD cohort and explore associations with vascular, motor, and nonmotor factors. Design, setting and participants: Case-only analysis of diverse patients with PD recruited to the East London Parkinson disease project (July 2022 to July 2025) at the Royal London Hospital, a tertiary referral center. Of 237 patients with cognitive status defined by expert, multi-disciplinary, clinical consensus, 223 remained after excluding atypical or secondary parkinsonism, other dementias, and study withdrawal. Exposures: Observational study (no experimental intervention); exposures included vascular risk factors, motor and nonmotor clinical features. Main Outcome(s) and Measure(s): The main outcome was cognitive impairment (PDCI), defined as mild cognitive impairment (PDMCI) or dementia (PDD) by expert clinical consensus based on clinical, imaging, and cognitive screening. Results: Among 223 participants with a median disease duration of 4.0 (1.0-9.0) years, 112 (50.2%) had PDCI, including 62 (27.8%) with PDD and 50 (22.4%) with PDMCI. South Asian ethnicity was associated with PDCI in univariate analysis (OR, 2.30; 95% CI, 1.32-4.00, P = .003) and the association strengthened after adjusting for age, gender, years of education, disease duration and depression scores (OR, 3.60; 95% CI, 1.68-7.69, P < .001). PDCI was associated with increased odds of smoking (OR, 3.62; 95% CI, 1.56-8.41, P = .003) in the adjusted model. Increased odds were also associated with motor severity (Movement Disorders Society Unified Parkinson Disease Rating Scale Part III; OR per point increase 1.07; 95% CI, 1.04-1.10; P < .001), and daytime somnolence score (Epworth Sleepiness Scale; OR per point increase, 1.08; 95% CI, 1.01-1.16; P = .03). Conclusions and Relevance: In this multi-ethnic study of PD using gold-standard expert multidisciplinary consensus, cognitive impairment was common and more prevalent among South Asian individuals. Smoking, greater motor severity, and higher daytime somnolence were associated with increased odds of cognitive impairment.
papers.translated_summary: 重要性：在帕金森病（PD）患者中，认知障碍的真实世界患病率及其临床决定因素在不同人群中的研究尚不充分。目的：确定不同PD队列中认知障碍的患病率，并探讨其与血管、运动及非运动因素的相关性。设计、背景与参与者：对伦敦皇家医院（三级转诊中心）东伦敦帕金森病项目（2022年7月至2025年7月）招募的不同PD患者进行病例分析。在237名经专家多学科临床共识明确认知状态的患者中，排除非典型或继发性帕金森综合征、其他痴呆及退出研究者后，剩余223名患者纳入分析。暴露因素：观察性研究（无实验干预）；暴露因素包括血管风险因素、运动及非运动临床特征。主要结局与测量指标：主要结局为认知障碍（PDCI），定义为轻度认知障碍（PDMCI）或痴呆（PDD），由专家基于临床、影像及认知筛查的临床共识确定。结果：在223名中位病程为4.0（1.0-9.0）年的参与者中，112人（50.2%）存在PDCI，其中62人（27.8%）为PDD，50人（22.4%）为PDMCI。单变量分析显示南亚裔与PDCI相关（OR, 2.30; 95% CI, 1.32-4.00, P = .003），调整年龄、性别、教育年限、病程及抑郁评分后相关性增强（OR, 3.60; 95% CI, 1.68-7.69, P < .001）。调整模型中，PDCI与吸烟风险增加相关（OR, 3.62; 95% CI, 1.56-8.41, P = .003），同时与运动严重程度（运动障碍学会统一帕金森病评定量表第三部分；每分增加OR, 1.07; 95% CI, 1.04-1.10; P < .001）及日间嗜睡评分（Epworth嗜睡量表；每分增加OR, 1.08; 95% CI, 1.01-1.16; P = .03）相关。结论与相关性：在这项采用金标准专家多学科共识的多种族PD研究中，认知障碍常见且在南亚裔个体中患病率更高。吸烟、更严重的运动症状及更高的日间嗜睡与认知障碍风险增加相关。

papers.title: Added Value of Software-Assisted Analysis in FDG-PET for Neurodegenerative Disease Diagnosis: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
papers.translated_title: 软件辅助分析在FDG-PET诊断神经退行性疾病中的附加价值：系统综述与荟萃分析
papers.author: Yoon, H.-J.
papers.summary: Background: In clinical practice, 18F-fluorodeoxyglucose positron emission tomography (FDG-PET) evaluation of neurodegenerative diseases relies primarily on visual interpretation, which is inherently subjective. Although current international guidelines recommend incorporating quantitative tools to support visual reading, the magnitude of the incremental diagnostic benefit and the clinical contexts in which it is most pronounced have not been formally synthesized in a systematic meta-analytic framework. Methods: Following the Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic reviews and Meta-Analyses for Diagnostic Test Accuracy (PRISMA-DTA) guidelines, we searched PubMed, EMBASE, Cochrane Library, and KoreaMed from inception to August 2025 for studies comparing visual-only versus visual-plus-quantitative FDG-PET interpretation within identical patient cohorts. Pooled sensitivity and specificity were estimated using random-effects models. Relative diagnostic performance was summarized as odds ratios (ORs), obtained by exponentiation posterior contrasts between visual analysis combined with quantitative analysis, and visual analysis. Subgroup analyses were conducted based on the clinical experience of the readers. Results: Ten studies met the inclusion criteria. In the overall analysis (k = 9), visual analysis alone yielded a pooled sensitivity of 0.85 and specificity of 0.78 , versus a sensitivity of 0.87 and specificity of 0.88 for the combined approach. The most pronounced gain was observed in differentiating Alzheimers disease (AD) from healthy controls, with specificity increasing from 0.69 to 0.94 (Bayesian OR 4.29). Quantitative augmentation conferred a larger sensitivity gain among beginner readers (increasing from 0.75 to 0.87; Bayesian OR 2.39) than among expert readers, narrowing the performance gap between experience levels. Conclusion: Adding quantitative analysis to visual FDG-PET interpretation yields modest overall improvements in diagnostic accuracy, with the largest gains observed in distinguishing AD from cognitively normal individuals and among less experienced readers. These findings are consistent with current international guidelines that position quantitative assessment as a complementary aid to visual interpretation rather than a replacement, with particular utility for less experienced practitioners and for specific differential-diagnostic scenarios.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：在临床实践中，18F-氟脱氧葡萄糖正电子发射断层扫描（FDG-PET）对神经退行性疾病的评估主要依赖视觉判读，而视觉判读本质上具有主观性。尽管当前国际指南建议引入定量工具辅助视觉判读，但定量工具带来的增量诊断获益程度及其最显著的临床情境，尚未通过系统荟萃分析框架进行正式整合。方法：遵循《诊断试验准确性系统评价和荟萃分析优先报告条目》（PRISMA-DTA）指南，我们检索了PubMed、EMBASE、Cochrane Library和KoreaMed数据库，时间范围从建库至2025年8月，纳入在同一患者队列中比较纯视觉判读与视觉联合定量FDG-PET判读的研究。采用随机效应模型估计合并敏感度和特异度。相对诊断性能以比值比（OR）汇总，通过视觉分析联合定量分析与纯视觉分析的后验对比指数计算得出。根据判读者的临床经验进行亚组分析。结果：共10项研究符合纳入标准。在总体分析中（k=9），纯视觉分析的合并敏感度为0.85、特异度为0.78，而联合方法的敏感度为0.87、特异度为0.88。在鉴别阿尔茨海默病（AD）与健康对照时获益最显著，特异度从0.69提升至0.94（贝叶斯OR 4.29）。与专家判读者相比，定量辅助对初学者判读者的敏感度提升更大（从0.75增至0.87；贝叶斯OR 2.39），缩小了不同经验水平之间的诊断性能差距。结论：在视觉FDG-PET判读基础上增加定量分析，可适度提升整体诊断准确性，其中在区分AD与认知正常个体以及经验不足的判读者中获益最大。这些发现与当前国际指南一致，即定量评估应作为视觉判读的补充工具而非替代方案，尤其适用于经验不足的从业者及特定鉴别诊断场景。
